jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Customer Data Platform
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Own the customer-data platform that anchors Klaviyo&#39;s e-commerce email and SMS marketing automation surface — the CDP profile-stitching pipeline, the events-ingestion API, and the segmentation engine that thousands of brands query in real time.</p><ul><li>Distributed-systems / streaming experience required</li></ul></div>

jobs.title: Account Executive, Large Enterprise
jobs.content: <p>Lead enterprise sales for Klaviyo&rsquo;s email / SMS / Reviews marketing-automation platform across the US East coast — Shopify Plus, BigCommerce, and Magento merchants in the $500M+ GMV segment.</p>
